info.name: BenoSupport HRMS — Complete API Collection
info.description:
Complete API collection for BenoSupport HRMS platform.

Version 2.1 — Updated with:
• File 08 fixes (Company statutory: cin/tan/pt_state)
• File 08 fixes (CompanyConfig: smtp/mfa/security fields)
• T-03 Module Access Matrix (folder 22)

Flow: Plans → Register → Login → Setup → HRMS → Payroll

Roles: SUPER_ADMIN > org_admin > company_admin > unit_admin > hr_manager > manager > employee

item.name: 📋 01. Plans

request.description: PUBLIC — No auth required. Returns all active plans with modules and pricing. Used in registration form.
PUBLIC — Get single plan details by ID. Used to show plan details page.
SUPER_ADMIN only — Get all plans including inactive ones.
SUPER_ADMIN only — Create new pricing plan. structure_level: unit/company/enterprise
SUPER_ADMIN only — Update plan. Note: Does NOT affect existing subscribers (plan_snapshot is used).
SUPER_ADMIN only — Soft delete plan. Cannot delete if active orgs use it.

item.description: Manage pricing plans. Public endpoint for registration. SUPER_ADMIN manages plans.

item.name: 🏢 02. Registration & Auth

request.description: PUBLIC — Register new organization. Creates Customer + Organization + OrgAdmin + Subscription atomically. Returns temp credentials via email.
Login for any role. Returns JWT token, user info, subscription details, permissions. is_first_login:true → must set password first.
Required on first login. After this, is_first_login becomes false. Token required from initial login.
Get current logged-in user profile with role and permissions.
Send password reset link to email. Publicly accessible.
Reset password using token received in email. Token expires in 1 hour.
Redirect to Google OAuth. Opens Google login page. Used for SSO.
EDGE CASE — Wrong password. Returns 401. After 5 attempts, account locks for 30 minutes.
EDGE CASE — Missing email. Returns 400 validation error.
EDGE CASE — Duplicate email registration. Returns 409 conflict.
EDGE CASE — Invalid plan ID. Returns 404 plan not found.

item.description: Org registration, login, password management. Start here for new org setup.

item.name: 🔐 03. MFA (Multi-Factor Auth)

request.description: Check if MFA is enabled for current user. Returns mfaEnabled: true/false.
Start MFA setup. Returns QR code URL and secret to scan with authenticator app (Google Auth, Authy).
Confirm MFA setup by entering TOTP code from authenticator. Activates MFA.
When MFA enabled, login returns tempToken. Submit TOTP code here to get full JWT.
Disable MFA. Requires current TOTP code for security.
Generate new backup codes. Old codes become invalid.

item.description: TOTP-based 2FA setup and management.

item.name: 🛡️ 04. Super Admin

request.description: SUPER_ADMIN — List all registered organizations with status and plan details.
SUPER_ADMIN — Get single org details including subscription and usage.
SUPER_ADMIN — Override org's plan. Use for manual upgrades. Creates audit log entry.
SUPER_ADMIN — Suspend or reactivate org. Suspended orgs cannot access APIs.
SUPER_ADMIN — Get all admin actions log. Filtered by date, action type, actor.
SUPER_ADMIN — Get full customer/tenant list from Customer collection.
SUPER_ADMIN — Dashboard with total orgs, users, plan breakdown, recent activity.

item.description: Beno team admin panel — tenant management, plan override, audit logs.

item.name: 🏭 05. Companies

request.description: ORG_ADMIN — Create company. LOBs are bundled in same request. Default leave types auto-seeded.
ORG_ADMIN — List all companies in the organization.
ORG_ADMIN / COMPANY_ADMIN — Get company details including modules.
ORG_ADMIN / COMPANY_ADMIN — Update company info including statutory fields.
ORG_ADMIN — Soft delete company. Blocked if active employees exist.
Get enabled modules for a company. Based on subscription plan_snapshot.
COMPANY_ADMIN — Enable/disable modules for this company within plan limits.
EDGE CASE — Duplicate company email in same org. Returns 409 conflict.

item.description: Company management. Org Admin creates companies with LOBs bundled.

item.name: 🔀 06. LOBs (Lines of Business)

request.description: Get all LOBs for the org. Scoped by org_id.
Get single LOB details.
COMPANY_ADMIN — Create new LOB. Appears in Unit creation dropdown.
COMPANY_ADMIN — Update LOB name/description.
COMPANY_ADMIN — Delete LOB. BLOCKED if active units exist under it.

item.name: 🔴 Edge: Delete LOB with active units

request.description: EDGE CASE — Delete LOB that has units. Returns 400 with active unit count.

item.description: LOB management. Usually created during company creation.

item.name: 🏪 07. Units (Business Units)

request.description: COMPANY_ADMIN — Create unit under a LOB. No admin auto-created. Manually invite unit_admin after.
Get all units scoped to user's company.
Get unit details. Unit Admin can see their own unit.
COMPANY_ADMIN — Update unit details.
COMPANY_ADMIN — Delete unit. BLOCKED if active employees exist.
EDGE CASE — Delete unit with active employees. Returns 400 with count.

item.description: Unit/BU management. No auto admin created.

item.name: 🔑 08. Roles & Permissions

request.description: Get roles filtered by user level. org_admin sees all levels. unit_admin sees only unit roles. Returns holderCount.
Get single role with full permissions list.
Get permissions that current user can assign to new roles. Parent ceiling rule — cannot assign more than you have.
COMPANY_ADMIN — Create custom role. Can only assign permissions current user possesses (parent ceiling rule).
COMPANY_ADMIN — Update custom role. Cannot update system roles (isSystem:true).
COMPANY_ADMIN — Delete custom role. BLOCKED if active users hold this role.
SUPER_ADMIN only — Get all system permissions with categories and FR references.
EDGE CASE — Delete system role (org_admin, employee etc). Returns 403 cannot delete system role.

item.name: 🔴 Edge: Create role above your level

request.description: EDGE CASE — Unit admin trying to create org-level role. Returns 403.

item.description:
Role management. System roles cannot be deleted. Custom roles per org.

NOTE: GET /roles now returns modules[] and holderCount for each role.
Use folder 22 for Module Matrix management.

item.name: 👤 09. Users

request.description: ORG_ADMIN — Invite company admin. Must provide company_id in body. Temp credentials sent via email.
COMPANY_ADMIN — Invite unit admin. Must provide unit_id. Org Admin can also do this with both company_id and unit_id.
UNIT_ADMIN — Invite HR manager for the unit.
Get users scoped to role level. Org Admin sees all users. ?roleType=Administrative filters admin users only (for Organisation → Users screen).
Filter users by role class. Administrative = config access. Privilege = functional. General = employee base.
Get role change history for a user. Shows all role transitions with timestamps.
Update user status, role, name. status=BLOCKED invalidates existing JWT (blockedAt mechanism).
UNIT_ADMIN+ — Soft delete user. Employee record also updated.
EDGE CASE — Duplicate email invite in same org. Returns 409 already registered.
EDGE CASE — Unit admin trying to assign org-level role. Returns 403 hierarchy violation.
EDGE CASE — When seat limit reached. Returns 403 seat limit exceeded.

item.description: User invitation and management. Admin roles are manually invited.

item.name: 🏬 10. Departments

request.description: UNIT_ADMIN — Create department in own unit. R-14: Cannot create in other units (API enforced). Company Admin can create in any unit.
Get departments scoped to user's unit. Company Admin sees all departments across units.
Get single department details.
Update department name/description.
Delete department. BLOCKED if active employees are assigned.
EDGE CASE — Delete dept with active employees. Returns 400 with count.

item.description: Department management. Unit Admin creates within own unit (R-14 enforced).

item.name: 💼 11. Designations

request.description: Create job designation. Used when creating employee records.
List all designations scoped to user's company/unit.
Get single designation.
Update designation details.
Delete designation. Cannot delete if employees are assigned.

item.description: Job title/designation management.

item.name: 👨‍💼 12. Employees

request.description: UNIT_ADMIN — Create employee record. Auto-generates EMP0001. Leave balances auto-initialized (T-17). Login NOT activated yet.
After creating employee, activate login access. Creates User record, sends credentials email. employee.userId gets linked.
Get employees scoped to role. Unit Admin sees own unit only. Company Admin sees all units.
Get full employee profile with department, designation, reporting manager.
Update employee details. Cannot change email, employeeId, org_id, company_id after creation.
Change employee status. TERMINATED requires exitDate. Terminated employees cannot be reactivated.
Soft delete employee. Must be TERMINATED or INACTIVE first. Cannot delete ACTIVE employee.
Upload employee document to Cloudinary. Use form-data with 'file' field.
Get all documents for an employee.
HR verifies employee document. Sets isVerified:true with verifiedBy and verifiedAt.
Soft delete employee document.
EDGE CASE — Duplicate email in same company. Returns 409.
EDGE CASE — When seat limit reached (plan based). Returns 403 seat limit exceeded.
EDGE CASE — Set self as reporting manager creates circular chain. Returns 400.

item.description: Employee lifecycle management. Two flows: Direct create OR invite as user.

item.name: 🎉 13. Holidays

request.description: Get national holiday master list. Used to import standard holidays into company calendar.
Import national holidays from master list into company calendar for the year.
Create company-specific holiday. type: NATIONAL/STATE/COMPANY/OPTIONAL.
Get holidays for current year. Employees can view upcoming holidays.
Get single holiday details.
Update holiday details.
Enable/disable a holiday without deleting it.
Delete holiday from company calendar.

item.description: Holiday calendar management. Affects attendance status and leave calculations.

item.name: 📝 14. Leave Types

request.description: Get all active leave types for company. Used in leave application form.
Get single leave type details including applicable gender, employment types.
HR_MANAGER — Create custom leave type. Cannot duplicate code within company.
Update leave type. Cannot modify system leave types (isSystem:true).
Soft delete custom leave type. System types cannot be deleted.

item.description: Define leave types per company. Auto-seeded on company create.

item.name: 📋 15. Leave Policies
Get Available Leave Types for Policy

request.description: Get leave types available to include in a policy.
UNIT_ADMIN — Create leave policy with approval flow. L1=Reporting Manager, L2=HR Manager, L1_L2=Both, AUTO=Auto approve.
Get leave policies for the unit/company.
Get single leave policy with all rules.
Update leave policy settings.
Activate leave policy. Only one active policy per scope at a time.
Archive old policy. Keeps historical data.
Deactivate policy without archiving.

item.description: Leave approval workflow and rules configuration.

item.name: 🏖️ 16. Leave Requests & Balances

request.description: HR — Manually initialize leave balance for an employee. Auto-initialized when employee is created (T-17).
EMPLOYEE — Apply for leave. Validates: balance, gender, employment type, past dates, overlap. L1/L2 approvers auto-assigned from policy. Email sent to approver.
Apply half day leave. session must be FIRST_HALF or SECOND_HALF. Start and end date must be same.
Get leave requests scoped to role. Employees see own requests. HR sees all unit requests. ?status=PENDING to filter.
Get single leave request with full approval history.
L1 APPROVER (Manager/Reporting Manager) — Forward to L2 HR. status=UNDER_REVIEW moves to L2.
L2 APPROVER (HR Manager) — Final approval. Balance is deducted. Employee email notification sent.
Reject leave. Balance is restored. Employee email notification sent with reason.
Employee cancels PENDING or UNDER_REVIEW leave. Balance is restored automatically.
Employee self-service — view own leave balances for all types in current year.
HR view — get leave balances for specific employee. ?year=2026 to filter by year.
HR manually adjust leave balance. Positive=credit, Negative=debit. Creates audit history entry.
EDGE CASE — Apply leave for past dates. Returns 400 cannot apply for past dates.
EDGE CASE — Male employee applying gender-restricted leave. Returns 400 gender mismatch.
EDGE CASE — Apply leave exceeding available balance. Returns 400 insufficient balance.
EDGE CASE — Dates overlap with existing leave. Returns 409 overlapping request.
EDGE CASE (expected success) — LOP leave skips balance check. Always allowed.

item.description: Employee leave applications, approval workflow, balance management.

item.name: 📊 17. Attendance Policies

request.description: Create attendance policy with shift timings. Punch-in will fail without an active policy.
Get attendance policies for the unit.
Get single attendance policy details.
Update attendance policy settings.

item.description: Shift timings, grace minutes, overtime rules.

item.name: ⏰ 18. Attendance

request.description: EMPLOYEE — Punch in. Auto-detects: LATE (policy grace minutes), HOLIDAY (from calendar), ON_LEAVE (approved leave today). Requires active attendance policy.
Punch in for Work From Home. Status becomes WFH instead of PRESENT.
EMPLOYEE — Punch out. Min 5 minutes after punch-in. Auto-calculates working hours and overtime.
Get today's punch status — checkIn, checkOut, status, lateMinutes, workingHours.
Get own attendance records for a month. Returns daily records.
Get monthly summary — present, absent, late, WFH, total hours.
HR — Get all employees' attendance for a month. ?employeeId= for specific employee. ?status=LATE for filter.
HR manually correct attendance record. Sets isRegularized:true. Creates audit trail.
EDGE CASE — Punch in when no active attendance policy configured. Returns 422.
EDGE CASE — Second punch in same day. Returns 409 already punched in.

item.name: 🔴 Edge: Punch out without punch in

request.description: EDGE CASE — Punch out without punch in. Returns 400.
EDGE CASE — Punch out within 5 minutes of punch in. Returns 400 minimum time guard.

item.description: Punch in/out, reports, regularization. Requires active attendance policy.

item.name: 💰 19. Payroll Policies

request.description: Create payroll policy. PF: 12% employee + 12% employer on basic. ESI: 0.75% if gross < 21000.
List payroll policies for the unit.
Get single payroll policy details.
Update payroll policy. Active policy can be updated.
Activate payroll policy for the unit.
Deactivate payroll policy.
Archive old payroll policy.
Run payroll for single employee. Calculates: basic+HRA+allowances - PF - ESI - TDS - LOP. Creates payslip in DRAFT status.
Run payroll for all employees in unit. Returns processed/failed count. Creates individual payslips.
Delete payroll policy.

item.description: Salary structure, PF/ESI/TDS config, payroll run.

item.name: ⚙️ 20. Company Configuration

request.description: Get company configuration. All employees can read. Returns timezone, currency, working days, regularisation window etc.
COMPANY_ADMIN — Initial config creation. Run once per company.
Update company config. Each section saves independently. SMTP for outgoing emails.

item.description: System preferences, security settings, SMTP, module flags.

item.name: 📈 21. Dashboards

request.description: Single dashboard endpoint. Auto-detects role and returns appropriate data. Used by all roles.
SUPER_ADMIN — Total orgs, users, plan breakdown, recent customer registrations.
ORG_ADMIN — Company stats, LOB count, user count, recent companies.
COMPANY_ADMIN — Unit stats, LOB count, users, upcoming holidays, recent units.
UNIT_ADMIN/HR — Attendance today, pending leaves, users, upcoming holidays. ?month=YYYY-MM
EMPLOYEE — Own attendance, leave balances, punch status, upcoming holidays.

item.description: Role-based dashboards. All roles have a common dashboard endpoint.

item.name: 🔲 22. Module Access Matrix (T-03)

request.description: Returns all roles with modules[] array and holderCount. Use this to build the module access matrix UI grid.

Update which modules a role can access. company_admin required.

Valid values: hrms, crm, sales, bd, admin, organisation
Set employee role to hrms only — standard setup. Employee only needs HRMS module access.
Unit Admin gets hrms + admin. Cannot access CRM/Sales/BD.
Org Admin gets all modules. Full platform access.
EDGE CASE — Invalid module name in array. Returns 400 with invalid module names listed.
EDGE CASE — Empty array removes all module access for that role.
EDGE CASE — modules as string instead of array. Returns 400.
EDGE CASE — unit_admin does not have role.update permission. Returns 403.
EDGE CASE — Role not found. Returns 404.

item.description:
Role × Module access control. Controls which modules appear in sidebar for each role.

Valid modules: hrms, crm, sales, bd, admin, organisation

Default access:
- org_admin/company_admin → all modules
- unit_admin/hr_manager → hrms + admin
- manager/employee → hrms only

Flow: GET /roles → see current modules → PUT /roles/:id/modules → update
